sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Evergy’s capital spending plan jumps 24% to $21.6B, driven by generation
feed.summary: Evergy has increased its five-year capital spending plan by 24% to $21.6 billion to meet surging electricity demand from data centers and industrial facilities like Panasonic's EV battery plant. The utility recently signed service agreements totaling 1.9 GW with Google, Meta, and Beale Infrastructure, leading to a projected 6% annual retail sales growth through 2030.

feed.title: Resilience in Re-commerce: An In-Depth Analysis of eBay Inc. (EBAY)
feed.summary: eBay has successfully transitioned from a generalist auction site to a specialized marketplace focused on high-value categories, luxury goods, and sustainable re-commerce. Driven by a "Tech-Led Reimagination" under CEO Jamie Iannone, the company reported robust FY 2025 results with $11.1 billion in revenue and continues to prioritize shareholder returns through aggressive buybacks.

feed.title: Host Hotels & Resorts sells 2 Four Seasons for combined $1.1B
feed.summary: Host Hotels & Resorts has sold the Four Seasons Resort Orlando and the Four Seasons Resort and Residences Jackson Hole for a combined $1.1 billion. The transaction is part of a broader divestment strategy by the REIT, which recently sold The St. Regis Houston and other properties to maximize liquidity and shareholder value.

feed.title: Sandisk stock jumps as Western Digital unloads shares — what traders are watching next
feed.summary: Sandisk shares rose over 3% as investors reacted to Western Digital selling a significant portion of its stake to reduce debt. While the secondary offering adds near-term supply, analysts view the move as a positive step toward clearing a long-standing share overhang and accelerating Western Digital's deleveraging efforts.

feed.title: Notice to Long-Term Shareholders of Integer Holdings Corp.
feed.summary: Grabar Law Office is investigating potential breaches of fiduciary duties by officers and directors of Integer Holdings Corp., Molina Healthcare, Varonis Systems, and WEBTOON Entertainment. The investigations follow various allegations of securities fraud, including misrepresenting competitive positions, failing to disclose deteriorating sales, and misleading investors about monthly active users or recurring revenue projections.

feed.title: Sempra's Vista Pacifico LNG project hit by permit setback
feed.summary: Mexico’s national energy commission has denied Sempra's application for a natural gas marketing permit for its Vista Pacífico LNG project in Sinaloa. The mid-scale export terminal, intended to supply US natural gas to Pacific markets, now faces regulatory hurdles as it aims for a 2029 operational start date.

feed.title: Akamai Q4 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Increase Y/Y
feed.summary: Akamai Technologies reported strong fourth-quarter 2025 results with adjusted earnings of $1.84 per share and revenues of $1.09 billion, both exceeding analyst expectations. Growth was driven by robust demand in the Security and Compute segments, particularly for Guardicore Segmentation and API security solutions.

feed.title: Analog Devices to Participate in the Morgan Stanley Technology, Media, and Telecom Conference
feed.summary: Analog Devices, Inc. (NASDAQ: ADI) announced that CFO Richard Puccio will participate in the Morgan Stanley Technology, Media, and Telecom Conference on March 3, 2026. Puccio will discuss business trends and topics, with a live webcast and subsequent replay available through the company's Investor Relations website.

feed.title: (ISO) Technical Pivots with Risk Controls (ISO:CA)
feed.summary: The report provides technical trading plans and AI-generated signals for IsoEnergy Ltd. (ISO:CA), featuring specific buy/short entry points and risk controls. Key technical ratings show a strong outlook for the near and long-term, despite a weak mid-term rating, with a suggested buy target near 14.49 and a short target at 16.74.

feed.title: Analog Devices to Participate in the Morgan Stanley Technology, Media, and Telecom Conference
feed.summary: Analog Devices, Inc. (ADI) announced that CFO Richard Puccio will participate in the Morgan Stanley Technology, Media, and Telecom Conference on March 3, 2026. The presentation will cover business topics and trends and will be available via a live webcast on the company's Investor Relations website.

feed.title: Abbott Laboratories Stock Is Down 16% From Its 52-Week High. Here’s Where the Stock Could Go in 2026
feed.summary: Abbott Laboratories (ABT) shares are trading around $112, reflecting a 16% pullback from recent highs due to a FreeStyle Libre 3 sensor recall and weakness in the Nutrition segment. Despite these headwinds, the company's Medical Devices segment remains strong, and upcoming catalysts including the Exact Sciences acquisition and the Volt PFA launch have analysts projecting a mean price target of $133.39.

feed.title: ENPH SHAREHOLDER ACTION REMINDER: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP Reminds Enphase (ENPH) Investors of Securities Class Action Deadline on April 20, 2026
feed.summary: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP has issued a reminder to Enphase Energy (ENPH) investors regarding an April 20, 2026, deadline to seek the lead plaintiff role in a federal securities class action lawsuit. The complaint alleges that Enphase made false or misleading statements regarding its channel inventory management and its ability to mitigate the termination of tax credits, leading to a significant stock price drop in October 2025.

feed.title: OLIN Corp SEC 10-K Report
feed.summary: Olin Corporation released its 2025 Form 10-K report, revealing a 4% increase in sales to $6.78 billion but a net loss of $100.5 million due to lower pricing, higher raw material costs, and litigation charges. The company executed several strategic moves, including the acquisition of AMMO, Inc.'s manufacturing assets and the termination of its Blue Water Alliance joint venture. Looking toward 2026, Olin expects improved results in its chemical and Winchester segments despite ongoing maintenance costs and market volatility.

feed.title: COCA COLA CO SEC 10-K Report
feed.summary: The Coca-Cola Company (KO) released its 2025 Form 10-K report, highlighting a 2% increase in net operating revenues to $47.9 billion and a 38% surge in operating income. The report details strategic shifts including the sunsetting of the Global Ventures segment, expansion into alcohol ready-to-drink beverages, and a continued focus on refranchising bottling operations globally.

feed.title: UnitedHealth Group Incorporated $UNH Shares Sold by Synovus Financial Corp
feed.summary: Synovus Financial Corp reduced its stake in UnitedHealth Group (NYSE:UNH) by 24.0% in the third quarter, selling 8,410 shares and retaining 26,641 shares valued at approximately $9.20 million. Despite this reduction and recent price target cuts from several firms, UnitedHealth Group maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average target price of $372.13. The company reported strong Q1 earnings, beating EPS estimates, and provided positive FY2026 guidance, while trading near $286 with a market capitalization of about $259 billion.

feed.title: HPQ Gears Up to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in Store for the Stock?
feed.summary: HP Inc. (HPQ) is scheduled to report its first-quarter fiscal 2026 results on Feb. 25, with analysts expecting a 4.1% increase in both revenue and earnings. While the company benefits from momentum in AI PCs and gaming hardware, macroeconomic challenges and rising memory costs remain potential headwinds for profitability.

feed.title: Dominion Energy set to report earnings as wind project costs mount
feed.summary: Dominion Energy is poised to report its fourth-quarter earnings, with investors keenly focused on the financial implications of its Coastal Virginia Offshore Wind project, which faced significant cost increases due to a federal shutdown and tariffs. Additionally, the market will scrutinize Dominion's strategy to meet the soaring electricity demand from Virginia's booming data center industry. Analysts are cautiously optimistic but will be looking for updates on project timelines, financial impacts, and any adjustments to the company's long-term EPS growth guidance.

feed.title: BMS and Johnson & Johnson battle over novel CAR-T cell therapy in Europe
feed.summary: BMS and Johnson & Johnson are engaged in a legal battle over their respective CAR-T cell therapies for multiple myeloma in Europe. BMS, through its acquired subsidiary 2seventy bio, has filed a patent infringement lawsuit at the UPC against Johnson & Johnson and Legend Biotech concerning their drug Carvykti. Concurrently, Johnson & Johnson is challenging the patent at the UK High Court and the European Patent Office.

feed.title: US business activity growth slows in February, S&P Global says
feed.summary: U.S. business activity expanded at the slowest rate in 10 months in February, according to S&P Global's flash Composite PMI Output Index, which fell to 52.3 from 53.0 in January. This deceleration was attributed to receding orders at factories, slackened growth for services firms, and stagnating employment across sectors. S&P Global's chief business economist, Chris Williamson, suggested this data indicates a significant cooling of the economy in the first quarter, with GDP rising at an annualized rate of merely 1.5%.

feed.title: Form 10-K COCA COLA CO For: Dec 31
feed.summary: The Coca-Cola Company filed its Form 10-K for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025, detailing its financial performance and operational structure. Key highlights include total net operating revenues of $47.941 billion, a significant increase in operating income to $13.762 billion (up 38% from 2024), and ongoing litigation with the IRS regarding a $14 billion potential tax liability. The report also addresses the company's strategic priorities, including managing product innovation, adapting to the digital marketplace, and ensuring sustainability.

feed.title: Jabil Circuit stock hits all-time high at 269.75 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Jabil Circuit stock reached an all-time high of $269.75, reflecting significant growth and strong market demand, with its price increasing by 58.23% over the past year. Despite its impressive performance, InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock might be overvalued. The company also announced a quarterly dividend, priced $1 billion in senior notes, and made a strategic investment in Eagle Harbor Technologies, Inc.

feed.title: Ross Stores stock hits all-time high at 200.64 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Ross Stores (ROST) stock reached an all-time high of $200.64, marking significant growth over the past year and outperforming market expectations for its Q4 earnings. Despite this strong performance and a "GREAT" financial health rating from InvestingPro, the stock is considered overvalued based on its current P/E ratio and Fair Value assessment. The company has also seen recent leadership changes and analyst price target increases.

feed.title: Gen Z wants wellness and enjoyment in home care, Clorox reports
feed.summary: A Clorox report reveals that Gen Z views home care as a source of wellness and enjoyment rather than a chore, influencing how products are designed and marketed. This generation seeks simplicity, versatility, and mental health benefits from cleaning, favoring multi-purpose cleaners and incorporating quick clean-ups into daily routines. Clorox is adapting through new campaigns like "Unleash the Bleach" and rebranding initiatives for products like Fresh Step cat litter, aiming to engage younger consumers by meeting them on social media and addressing their lifestyle preferences.

feed.title: Campbell’s shakes up snack leadership
feed.summary: Campbell’s has appointed Mohit Anand, formerly of Kellanova and Mars Snacking, as the new president of its snack division, effective February 23. He replaces Elizabeth Duggan and is tasked with revitalizing profitable growth for the division, which has seen net sales decline. This change comes as Campbell's, like other food giants, faces challenges with lower snack consumption.

feed.title: Merck & Co., Inc. (NYSE:MRK) Now Covered by Analysts at Barclays
feed.summary: Barclays has initiated coverage on Merck & Co., Inc. (NYSE:MRK) with an "overweight" rating and a $140.00 price target, suggesting a 14.91% potential upside. This report follows other analysts who have also recently adjusted their ratings and price targets for Merck, contributing to a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating with a target price of $124.80. The article also details the company's recent stock performance, earnings, and insider trading activity.

feed.title: Monster Beverage (NASDAQ:MNST) Price Target Raised to $88.00 at Deutsche Bank Aktiengesellschaft
feed.summary: Deutsche Bank Aktiengesellschaft has raised its price target for Monster Beverage (NASDAQ:MNST) from $84.00 to $88.00, reiterating a "buy" rating on the stock. This new target suggests a potential upside of 7.33% from the current share price. Other analysts have also recently adjusted their ratings and price targets for MNST, contributing to a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating for the company.

feed.title: Markel Group Inc. $MKL Stock Position Boosted by Vanguard Group Inc.
feed.summary: Vanguard Group Inc. increased its stake in Markel Group Inc. (NYSE:MKL) by 0.4% in the third quarter, bringing its total ownership to 1,172,997 shares valued at $2.24 billion. Analysts hold a "Hold" consensus rating for MKL with an average price target of $2,100, although some have recently adjusted their recommendations. Institutional investors collectively own 77.12% of the stock, while insiders have sold a total of 1,575 shares worth approximately $3.33 million in the last 90 days.

feed.title: Vanguard Group Inc. Lowers Stock Position in Kimco Realty Corporation $KIM
feed.summary: Vanguard Group Inc. reduced its stake in Kimco Realty Corporation by 0.5% in the third quarter of 2025, selling 589,903 shares and retaining over 108 million shares valued at approximately $2.37 billion. Despite this sale, other institutional investors increased their holdings in Kimco Realty. The company has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.26 per share, and analysts rate Kimco as a "Moderate Buy" with a consensus target price of $24.18.

feed.title: Vanguard Group Inc. Sells 786,461 Shares of Halliburton Company $HAL
feed.summary: Vanguard Group Inc. reduced its stake in Halliburton Company (NYSE:HAL) by 0.7% in Q3, selling 786,461 shares but still holding over 104 million shares valued at approximately $2.57 billion. The article notes that Halliburton beat quarterly earnings estimates and announced a $0.17 quarterly dividend. Corporate insiders have also been net sellers of the stock, disposing of 337,002 shares worth about $11.45 million in the past 90 days.

feed.title: Vanguard Group Inc. Has $2.34 Billion Position in F5, Inc. $FFIV
feed.summary: Vanguard Group Inc. reported a $2.34 billion position in F5, Inc. (NASDAQ:FFIV) after trimming its holdings by 2.1% to 7,242,760 shares, representing 12.61% of the company. F5 recently surpassed Q1 earnings and revenue estimates and provided optimistic Q2 and full-year 2026 guidance. Despite institutional ownership of nearly 90.7%, insiders have sold shares totaling around $4.95 million in the past 90 days, while the street’s consensus rating for FFIV remains a "Hold."

feed.title: FedEx ‘highly confident’ grounded MD-11s will return to service
feed.summary: FedEx remains optimistic that its fleet of 28 MD-11 freighters will return to service despite a protracted grounding following a fatal crash involving a UPS MD-11. The company expects the aircraft to be back in operation between March and May, even as UPS has permanently retired its MD-11 fleet. FedEx emphasized the diligence of its maintenance and crew training, projecting these planes could fly until 2032.

feed.title: Vanguard Group Inc. Lowers Holdings in Camden Property Trust $CPT
feed.summary: Vanguard Group Inc. reduced its stake in Camden Property Trust (NYSE:CPT) by 0.5% in the third quarter, while still holding over 17 million shares valued at approximately $1.82 billion. Camden Property Trust missed Q4 EPS estimates but approved a $600 million share buyback and increased its quarterly dividend. Insider selling also occurred, with officers selling shares worth nearly $6 million, reducing insider ownership to 1.80%.

feed.title: Vanguard Group Inc. Acquires 39,929 Shares of Zimmer Biomet Holdings, Inc. $ZBH
feed.summary: Vanguard Group Inc. increased its stake in Zimmer Biomet Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:ZBH) by acquiring an additional 39,929 shares in the third quarter, bringing its total holdings to 23,291,224 shares valued at approximately $2.29 billion. Zimmer Biomet recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates with $2.42 EPS and $2.24 billion in revenue, and announced a quarterly dividend of $0.24. Institutional investors collectively own 88.89% of the stock, which analysts currently rate as a "Hold" with an average target price of $106.20.

feed.title: N-able (NYSE:NABL) Price Target Lowered to $8.00 at Needham & Company LLC
feed.summary: Needham & Company LLC has lowered its price target for N-able (NYSE:NABL) from $10.00 to $8.00, while maintaining a "buy" rating, indicating a potential upside of 68.95%. This revision follows mixed financial results, including a revenue beat alongside an EPS miss in the latest quarter. Despite varied analyst opinions, the stock currently holds a consensus "Hold" rating with an average target price of $8.45.

feed.title: Skandinaviska Enskilda Banken AB publ Reduces Position in Brown & Brown, Inc. $BRO
feed.summary: Skandinaviska Enskilda Banken AB publ significantly reduced its stake in Brown & Brown, Inc. by 26.1% in Q3, selling 25,793 shares, while other major institutions like Vanguard and Principal Financial Group increased their positions. Despite Skandinaviska Enskilda Banken's reduction, institutional investors collectively own about 71.01% of the company's stock. Brown & Brown performed well in earnings per share but missed revenue expectations; the stock maintains a consensus "Hold" rating from analysts with an average price target of $90.36.

feed.title: Vanguard Group Inc. Sells 273,789 Shares of Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. $ARE
feed.summary: Vanguard Group Inc. reduced its stake in Alexandria Real Estate Equities (NYSE:ARE) by 1.0%, selling 273,789 shares and now owning 25,807,182 shares valued at $2.15 billion. The real estate investment trust reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates, and has initiated a $500 million share buyback program. Additionally, insider purchases and a recent dividend increase signal management confidence in the company.

feed.title: Vanguard Group Inc. Decreases Holdings in KeyCorp $KEY
feed.summary: Vanguard Group Inc. reduced its stake in KeyCorp by 1.5% in the third quarter of 2025, selling 1,943,251 shares but still holding over 123 million shares valued at approximately $2.31 billion. KeyCorp reported strong Q4 results, beating EPS and revenue estimates, and announced a quarterly dividend. Insider selling also occurred, with two directors significantly decreasing their holdings.

feed.title: Barclays Begins Coverage on Gilead Sciences (NASDAQ:GILD)
feed.summary: Barclays has initiated coverage on Gilead Sciences (NASDAQ:GILD) with an "equal weight" rating and a $155.00 price target, suggesting a potential upside of 2.57%. Other analysts have recently issued reports with price targets ranging from $129.00 to $171.00, resulting in a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating and an average target price of $154.24. The biopharmaceutical company recently reported strong earnings, beating analyst estimates, and has seen some insider selling activity.

feed.title: Vanguard Group Inc. Acquires 552,360 Shares of Best Buy Co., Inc. $BBY
feed.summary: Vanguard Group Inc. increased its stake in Best Buy Co., Inc. (NYSE:BBY) by 2.4% in the third quarter, acquiring an additional 552,360 shares and bringing its total ownership to 23,947,415 shares, valued at approximately $1.81 billion. This makes Vanguard Group Inc. the largest institutional holder with 11.40% of the company. Best Buy recently beat quarterly earnings estimates and offers a 5.8% dividend yield, despite a "Hold" consensus rating from analysts and a trading price of $65.85 against an average target of $80.32.

feed.title: Alexander & Baldwin (ALEX): The Hawaii Land Play Wall Street’s Re-Rating
feed.summary: Alexander & Baldwin (ALEX) is pivoting into a pure-play Hawaii commercial real estate investment trust (REIT), focusing on high-demand industrial and grocery-anchored retail properties. The company is shedding legacy agricultural and development assets to provide a cleaner, more predictable recurring-income story for institutional and retail investors.

feed.title: Scotiabank cuts N-Able stock price target on growth concerns
feed.summary: Scotiabank has reduced its price target for N-Able Inc. (NYSE:NABL) shares to $5.25 from $8.75, while maintaining a Sector Perform rating, citing growth concerns and unexciting top-line performance. The firm questioned the potential for outperformance given the 2026 guidance, which incorporates new products in the latter half of the year. Despite the essential nature of N-Able's software, Scotiabank observed no AI-related tailwinds and noted that a top-line acceleration would be necessary for the stock to re-rate higher, a view it currently cannot confidently support in a fragmented software market.

feed.title: Skandinaviska Enskilda Banken AB publ Has $4.70 Million Stock Position in United Airlines Holdings Inc $UAL
feed.summary: Skandinaviska Enskilda Banken AB publ significantly reduced its stake in United Airlines Holdings Inc (UAL) by 43.7% in the third quarter, holding shares valued at $4.7 million. Despite this, United Airlines surpassed earnings expectations with strong Q3 results and provided positive guidance for Q1 and FY2026. The article also notes significant insider selling by the company's president and CEO, alongside various analyst upgrades and a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for UAL stock.

feed.title: Vanguard Group Inc. Sells 510,401 Shares of Textron Inc. $TXT
feed.summary: Vanguard Group Inc. reduced its stake in Textron Inc. (NYSE:TXT) by 2.4% in the third quarter, selling over 510,000 shares but still owning approximately 11.85% of the company. Despite missing EPS estimates by a narrow margin, Textron reported strong revenue that beat expectations and provided optimistic FY2026 guidance. Insider selling also occurred, with two executive VPs selling significant shares, while institutional investors generally increased their holdings.

feed.title: Vanguard Group Inc. Trims Holdings in Las Vegas Sands Corp. $LVS
feed.summary: Vanguard Group Inc. reduced its stake in Las Vegas Sands Corp. by 2.0% in Q3, selling 844,847 shares, but still owning 42,227,167 shares valued at $2.27 billion. The casino operator exceeded Q4 earnings estimates with $0.85 EPS and $3.65 billion in revenue, and increased its quarterly dividend to $0.30. Despite significant insider selling totaling approximately $207 million, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a consensus price target of $68.55.

feed.title: Domino's Pizza Inc $DPZ Shares Sold by Vanguard Group Inc.
feed.summary: Vanguard Group Inc. reduced its stake in Domino's Pizza Inc. (NASDAQ:DPZ) by 0.5% in the third quarter, selling 20,462 shares but still retaining roughly 11.92% of the company, valued at $1.74 billion. Other institutional investors like Norges Bank and Sterling Capital Management LLC increased their positions, leading to institutional ownership now standing at about 94.63%. Despite mixed analyst sentiment and a consensus "Hold" rating, the article details recent price performance and insider selling activity.

feed.title: West Pharmaceutical Services (WST) is Returning to Sustainable Volume Growth
feed.summary: Conestoga Capital Advisors highlighted West Pharmaceutical Services, Inc. (WST) in its Q4 2025 investor letter, noting the company's strong performance driven by its High-Value Products segment and GLP-1 therapies. Management indicated a moderation of destocking headwinds, signaling a return to sustainable volume growth for WST. While West Pharmaceutical Services is not among the 30 most popular stocks among hedge funds, Conestoga Capital Advisors believes it remains a critical partner to the pharmaceutical industry, poised to benefit from long-term trends toward biologic and injectable medicines.

feed.title: Texas Pacific Land Stock Rallies 10% on Record Royalties: Here’s Where the Stock Could Go in 2026
feed.summary: Texas Pacific Land (TPL) stock surged 10.40% to $486.56 after reporting record-breaking financial results, driven by strong oil and gas royalty production and new ventures into AI data centers and water resources. Despite its unique business model and strong financials, TIKR's valuation model suggests the stock is currently overvalued with a projected 4.6% downside from its target price of $463.98, advising caution for investors. The company's expansion into technology infrastructure and its "fortress balance sheet" were highlighted by CEO Ty Glover, but the model indicates these growth prospects are already priced in.

feed.title: Simon Property Group Announces David Simon's Resignation from Klépierre Supervisory Board
feed.summary: Simon Property Group (NYSE: SPG) announced that David Simon has resigned from the Klépierre S.A. Supervisory Board, effective February 19, 2026. Simon Property Group is a real estate investment trust specializing in shopping, dining, entertainment, and mixed-use destinations across North America, Europe, and Asia.

feed.title: What Makes Rollins (ROL) Conestoga Capital Advisors’ Core Holding
feed.summary: Conestoga Capital Advisors, despite its Mid Cap Strategy underperforming in Q4 2025 and for the full year, maintains Rollins, Inc. (ROL) as a core holding. The asset management company appreciates Rollins for its consistent pricing power, recurring revenue stability, defensive characteristics, and ability to compound earnings through various economic cycles, as highlighted in their Q4 2025 investor letter. Rollins reported record revenue of $3.8 billion in 2025, demonstrating strong organic growth and a double-digit dividend increase.

feed.title: OXY: Susquehanna Raises Occidental Petroleum Price Target To $60
feed.summary: Susquehanna has raised its price target for Occidental Petroleum (OXY) to $60.00 from $51.00, while maintaining a Positive rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects an optimistic outlook for the company, despite varying opinions from other analysts on its market positioning. Occidental Petroleum is an independent exploration and production company with significant operations in the US, Latin America, and the Middle East, boasting net proved reserves of 4.6 billion barrels of oil equivalent at the end of 2024.
